overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long World Stock Daily ETF (WLDU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of the Vanguard Total World Stock Index Fund ETF (Ticker: VT), which tracks a market-cap weighted index of global equities across developed and emerging markets. WLDU was launched on Mar 10, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
